goal: A working Meno that passes the zombie test, not just green tests.

R0.name: Define 'alive' as executable criteria
R0.deliverable: Evidence-returning probes (particularity, initiative, synthesis, novelty, divergence) + zombie_report verdict, gated on cognition_real.

p0s_found_and_closed: synthesis passed the stub via the bare >=2-entry-point branch
no test ran a live accumulating loop (vacuous discrimination)
synthesis source_terms re-derived at audit time -> forgetting made stub words emergent (temporal)
provenance desync: reconstruct could thin source_text while auditor held richer text
stub template literal 'these fragments' fallback read as emergent
adversarial_review.p1_closed: store_cue froze provenance from entry_points, not the true synthesise material
structural_fixes: ReflectionCue.source_text: provenance frozen at generation, MONOTONIC (never narrows)
_BOILERPLATE derived from the stub's real outputs (closes the template-drift class)
verdict gated on cognition_real (stub run -> indeterminate, never alive)
adversarial_review.final_state: All 6 break attempts return 0.0; a full stub-built mind reads 'zombie'.

R1.name: Real cognition, validated end to end
R1.deliverable: All 5 surfaces validated against real Claude (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus); loud-failure telemetry; verdict FAILS CLOSED on cognition (auto-wired, synth-tier gate); merge caveat closed into a live emergent insight.

adversarial_review.p0_closed: cognition gate failed open (None -> alive) and was unwired; now fails closed + auto-derives from provider telemetry
p1_closed: all-or-nothing fallback poisoned long runs / hollow pass -> synth-tier gate + 0.9 floor
relate fallback corrupts merge topology -> R5 uses strict=True (documented)
adversarial_review.bug_caught_by_telemetry: wonder truncated JSON at max_tokens=200 -> silent stub fallback; raised to 512
adversarial_review.final_state: P0+P1 closed with reproduced evidence; re-review recommends advance.

R2.name: Continuous operation
R2.deliverable: Driver runs the default-mode loop autonomously (reactive -> quiet -> dream), idle backoff (no spin), thread-safe bounded ingress, resilient to cycle errors, honest stop. `python -m meno --live` shows the agent wondering with no input.

p0_closed: metronome curiosity (argmax-salience) -> neglected-node, varied framing, anti-repeat
raised cycle silently killed the driver thread -> resilient continue / loud stop
stop() lied on join timeout -> returns bool, keeps handle, running stays truthful
adversarial_review.p2_closed: curiosity starved most of the neglected middle behind a fixed 5-window -> walks full below-median set
adversarial_review.kernel_change: boredom (_idle_ticks) persists across heartbeats so a sustained-quiet mind reaches out on its own (the dead top-down path, now live)
adversarial_review.final_state: 3 P0s + N1 closed with run evidence; re-review recommends advance.

R3.name: Lifetime-growth hardening (D19)
R3.deliverable: A1 bus.log bounded ring + lifetime counter + windowed stream id-lists; A2 warm-stream reaper + capped pressure; A3 reconsolidation cost capped, and reflection forgetting given the faithful tiered descent (islanded ghost -> rediscovery via gist -> reflective, journaled grief).

p0_closed: cue retirement was GC that deleted ghost memories (denied reflections the islanding tier) -> tiered ghost/rediscovery/reflective-grief
retirement never fired + dream O(nodes*edges) -> fires+capped, dream ~linear (O(edges) promote, O(cues*entry) ghost)
event_ids/node_ids leaked 1:1 with lifetime -> windowed to 256
adversarial_review.high_closed: grief reflection was gist-only + self-grieved forever -> journaled (durable/recallable, exempt from ghost path)
adversarial_review.deferred: residual O(nodes) similar() in rediscovery is the roadmap's indexing/ANN concern (profile-triggered scale phase), not a leak
adversarial_review.final_state: 3 P0s + HIGH closed with measured evidence; re-review recommends advance.
